items.name: claude-header
items.title: Claude Header
items.description: Claude Code's welcome box — logo, tips, and model/cwd lines — with the title as a semantic fieldset legend.

items.name: claude-message
items.title: Claude Message
items.description: A conversation turn — Claude Code's ❯ chip for the user, plain text for the assistant.

items.name: claude-thinking
items.title: Claude Thinking
items.description: The working line — pulsing sparkle, rotating verb, elapsed/interrupt hint — as an aria-live status region.

items.name: claude-tool-call
items.title: Claude Tool Call
items.description: The ⏺ / ⎿ tool line as a real, keyboard-operable <details> disclosure.

items.name: claude-todo-list
items.title: Claude Todo List
items.description: The Update Todos block as a real list, with state labels and a struck-through done style.

items.name: claude-diff
items.title: Claude Diff
items.description: An inline edit hunk with tinted +/- rows, line numbers, and off-screen added/removed labels.

items.name: claude-permission
items.title: Claude Permission
items.description: The 'Do you want to proceed?' approval prompt as an arrow-key radiogroup.

items.name: claude-prompt
items.title: Claude Prompt
items.description: The input composer — dual CSS rules around a real text input, effort chips (low ○ / medium ◐ / high ● / xhigh ◉ / max ◈ / ultracode ✦), and shift+tab modes (auto / manual / accept-edits / plan).

items.name: claude-slash-menu
items.title: Claude Slash Menu
items.description: Slash-command palette above the real ClaudePrompt composer — type after / to filter, arrow keys to move.

items.name: codex-header
items.title: Codex Header
items.description: Codex CLI's monochrome launch card with its model / directory rows.

items.name: codex-message
items.title: Codex Message
items.description: A Codex conversation turn — bold › user marker or plain assistant text.

items.name: codex-exec
items.title: Codex Exec
items.description: A Codex action/exec line with a status dot and expandable output, as a real <details> disclosure.

items.name: codex-working
items.title: Codex Working
items.description: Codex's Working line — a • bullet, grayscale shimmer on Working, and live elapsed/interrupt hint, as an aria-live status region.

items.name: codex-prompt
items.title: Codex Prompt
items.description: Codex's › text input with warm model / green cwd status line and Plan mode tag (#bb9af7).

items.name: codex-diff
items.title: Codex Diff
items.description: Codex's full-screen /diff pager — spaced DIFF title bar, unified git hunks, ~ fillers, and quit footer.

items.name: codex-permissions
items.title: Codex Permissions
items.description: The /permissions chooser — numbered Default / Auto-review / Full Access options as a real radiogroup.

items.name: codex-slash-menu
items.title: Codex Slash Menu
items.description: Slash-command palette under the real CodexPrompt composer — type after / to filter, arrow keys to move.

items.name: grok-header
items.title: Grok Header
items.description: Grok CLI's launch card — the braille mark drawn as a crisp dot-matrix SVG with its resting grayscale-shimmer sweep (reduced-motion aware), build banner, and a start menu of real buttons.

items.name: grok-status
items.title: Grok Status
items.description: Top status bar — branch glyph, cwd, context usage (16K / 500K), and optional turn progress (2/3 ✓).

items.name: grok-message
items.title: Grok Message
items.description: A Grok conversation turn — the ❯ user marker or plain assistant text, with optional wall-clock timestamp.

items.name: grok-event
items.title: Grok Event
items.description: A ◆ diamond event line — Thought, user_prompt_submit, stop — with optional [hooks: N/M] badge.

items.name: grok-thought
items.title: Grok Thought
items.description: Completed or streaming thought — ◆ Thought for 0.2s, or a bordered Thinking… body.

items.name: grok-thinking
items.title: Grok Thinking
items.description: Grok's idle working line — a braille spinner and rotating verb in amber, as an aria-live status region.

items.name: grok-working
items.title: Grok Working
items.description: In-turn status line — Waiting for response… with elapsed, ⇣token count, and [stop].

items.name: grok-tool
items.title: Grok Tool
items.description: A Grok action — compact verb+path, or a ┃ ◆ card with [hooks: N].

items.name: grok-write
items.title: Grok Write
items.description: Grok's inline write/edit chrome — line-numbered before/after inside a ┃ gutter, with optional hook ✓/✗ lines.

items.name: grok-permission
items.title: Grok Permission
items.description: Grok's left-border approval card with (●)/(○) radios and a 1/3:select hint bar.

items.name: grok-plan
items.title: Grok Plan
items.description: Grok's plan.md approval card — framed viewer, a/s/c/q actions, Waiting on plan approval, and plan-approval composer.

items.name: grok-project-picker
items.title: Grok Project Picker
items.description: Run Grok Build in a project directory? — left-border chooser with recent dirs and a free-text option.

items.name: grok-shortcuts
items.title: Grok Shortcuts
items.description: Keyboard Shortcuts modal (Ctrl+x) — nested ◆/› categories with key bindings.

items.name: grok-settings
items.title: Grok Settings
items.description: Settings modal (F2) — Appearance / Mouse sections with ▸ rows, on/off values, and nested › pickers.

items.name: grok-turn-end
items.title: Grok Turn End
items.description: Post-turn footer — Turn completed in 8.0s.

items.name: grok-slash-menu
items.title: Grok Slash Menu
items.description: Slash-command overlay above the real GrokPrompt composer — ❯ active row, type after / to filter.

items.name: grok-prompt
items.title: Grok Prompt
items.description: Grok's rounded CSS-border composer with a real text input and model · mode legend (normal / plan / auto / always-approve / plan approval).

items.name: claude-session
items.title: Claude Session
items.description: A complete Claude Code screen: header, a full turn (plan, tool calls, diff, approval, working line) and the input composer.

items.name: codex-session
items.title: Codex Session
items.description: A complete Codex CLI screen: header, a full turn (messages, exec lines, working) and the › composer.

items.name: grok-session
items.title: Grok Session
items.description: A complete Grok CLI screen: status bar, header, and a full turn (events, thought, tools, write, approval, turn end) with the rounded composer.

items.name: grok-session-active
items.title: Grok Session Active
items.description: A mid-turn Grok CLI screen: status bar, streaming thought, tool card, write preview, and the working footer with ⇣tokens / [stop].

items.name: pied-piper-onboarding
items.title: Pied Piper Onboarding
items.description: An interactive sign-up flow — Pied Piper header, typed assistant lines, thinking between turns, and the Claude composer for name + intent.

items.name: index
items.title: brainless
items.description: Default brainless install — Claude, Codex, and Grok session blocks.
